# Gilteritinib Fumarate 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Gilteritinib Fumarate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Gilteritinib Fumarate</strong> 目前有 <strong>29 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Gilteritinib Fumarate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Xospata is indicated as monotherapy for the treatment of adult patients who have relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukaemia (AML) with a FLT3 mutation.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with t(8;21)(q22;q22) translocation（99.5%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with CEBPA somatic mutations（99.4%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with inv3(p21;q26.2) or t(3;3)(p21;q26.2)（99.4%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia and myelodysplastic syndromes related to topoisomerase type 2 inhibitor（99.3%）</li>
<li>bulbar polio（99.1%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia and myelodysplastic syndromes related to alkylating agent（99.0%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia and myelodysplastic syndromes related to radiation（99.0%）</li>
<li>5q35 microduplication syndrome（98.9%）</li>
<li>myeloid leukemia（98.6%）</li>
<li>therapy related acute myeloid leukemia and myelodysplastic syndrome（98.5%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with t(8;16)(p11;p13) translocation（98.5%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with t(9;11)(p22;q23)（98.3%）</li>
<li>unclassified acute myeloid leukemia（98.2%）</li>
<li>acute myeloblastic leukemia with maturation（98.2%）</li>
<li>acute myeloblastic leukemia without maturation（98.1%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with t(6;9)(p23;q34)（98.1%）</li>
<li>neuralgic amyotrophy（98.1%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with minimal differentiation（98.1%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic neuralgia（98.0%）</li>
<li>inherited acute myeloid leukemia（97.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/gilteritinib-fumarate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
